meaning: n.人行横道(供行人穿越道路用)
examples: They may be able to emulate the dripping sound of a crosswalk, or the buzz of a power tool.
Kangkang, that old man is crossing the crosswalk.
Now the students feel safer than before after the installation of the smart crosswalk.
She was crossing at an intersection, but was apparently not in a designated crosswalk.
London (CNN) -- A striped crosswalk in London entered the history books Wednesday for a second time.
